comment: 68yo male, 22 years in pre-regulation dye industry (benzidine + 2-naphthylamine handling, pre-1980s). No current cancer. Engine routes to PreventionPlan: standard = annual urinalysis + urine cytology + low-threshold cystoscopy for hematuria + smoking cessation; alternative = routine general-population urology screening. Validates v0.3 aromatic amines → bladder cancer prevention pilot.
